title: Moving Goods
description: The Guild needs a new fence in Thornfield. Smuggle a package of stolen goods to contact Silas without alerting the guards. Guards patrol the road between Dalhurst and Thornfield.

objectives.description: Deliver the package to Silas in Thornfield

challenge.description: Avoid guard patrols on the road. Getting caught may result in confiscation or fine.

notes: Promotion to Footpad upon completion. Establishes fence contact in Thornfield. Silas becomes recurring NPC.
